auth.title: Flatlord
auth.googleNote: Google OAuth (Supabase Auth) — invited accounts only.
auth.magicLinkNote: You will get a one-time sign-in link by email — no password needed.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.privateNote: Private app: no self-signup. Your account is created by the owner; a tenant sees only their own tenancy.
auth.roleNote: After sign-in, role decides the interface: tenant → portal · owner → admin.
auth.errorNotInvited: This account doesn't have a valid invite.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong signing in. Please try again.

invites.createdNote: Invite created — tell {email} to sign in with that exact email address (Google or the magic link) as {role}. No password or code needed.
invites.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
